The question is asking which ferry was delivered directly after Princess Teguise. To find out, we need to sort the data based on the "delivery" column which contains date information, in the order of "small to large" (chronological order) using the f_sort_column(delivery) operation. This will allow us to see the delivery sequence of the ferries and identify which one came immediately after Princess Teguise.

The ferry delivered directly after Princess Teguise was Toppy 2. Princess Teguise was delivered in June 1991, and Toppy 2 was delivered in April 1992, which is the next delivery after Princess Teguise.
